name: Radroach Races
author: @Theeohn @CodyTolene
description: A version of the internet famous Horse Race Tests game now for your Pip-boy. Start the game up, 5 seconds to place your bets and they're off! Using logic similar to the DVD bouncing logo to race to the mutfruit at the end, who will win? 5 Roaches, 10 seperate tracks. Endless hours of fun watching, betting, and forming your own headcanons!
